title: DOWNLOAD
body: Go to inductiveautomation.com/downloads. Select your OS (Windows/Linux/Mac). Download the full installer — not the edge or zip version for your first time.
code:
Platform:   Windows (.exe) | Linux (.run) | Mac (.dmg)
Size:       ~1.2 GB
Includes:   Java runtime (bundled)
            Gateway service
            All modules (trial)
key: Pick the FULL installer, not Edge
Java is bundled — do NOT install Java separately
All modules included — you choose which to activate
mistakes: Downloading Edge version (limited, for edge gateways only)
Installing Java separately (conflicts with bundled JRE)
Downloading the zip instead of installer (no service registration)
